evals.name: list-page-loading
evals.expected_output: A single loading.tsx file that uses the ListLoading shared component with the correct translation namespace and title key.
expectations: Single file output: only `loading.tsx` — no feature-level component needed for list pages
Uses the shared `ListLoading` component imported from `@/shared/components/ListLoading`
Function is `async` because it uses `getTranslations` from `next-intl/server`
Translation namespace matches the page: `getTranslations("members")`
Passes `t("title")` as the `title` prop to `ListLoading`
Function name follows route convention — e.g. `AdminMembersLoading` or similar PascalCase from route segments
Does NOT import any data-fetching functions, list components, modals, or SearchParams — loading pages have no data

evals.name: form-subpage-loading
evals.expected_output: Two files: a page-level loading.tsx that delegates to a feature-level ReferenceAccountLoading component, and the feature-level component that uses SubPageHeaderSkeleton + FormLayout + FormSkeleton.
expectations: Two files generated: page-level `loading.tsx` and feature-level `ReferenceAccountLoading.tsx`
Page-level loading.tsx is a thin wrapper that imports and renders `ReferenceAccountLoading` from `@/features/referenceAccount/components/ReferenceAccountLoading`
Feature-level component uses `SubPageHeaderSkeleton` with title from `getTranslations("referenceAccount")` — specifically `t("updateReferenceAccountForm.title")` matching the page's header title
Feature-level component uses `FormLayout` > `FormLayoutArea gridArea="form"` > `FormSkeleton` — mirroring the page's form layout structure
Feature-level component wraps content in `PageContent`
Feature-level component is an async server component using `getTranslations` from `next-intl/server` (not useTranslations)
Does NOT import any data-fetching functions, form components, or the FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader

evals.name: cards-grid-loading
evals.expected_output: Two files: a page-level loading.tsx that delegates to a feature-level LegalRepresentativesLoading, and the feature-level component that uses SubPageHeaderSkeleton + Typography description + CardsGridLayout with BoxSkeleton cards.
expectations: Two files generated: page-level `loading.tsx` and feature-level `LegalRepresentativesLoading.tsx`
Page-level loading.tsx is a thin wrapper that imports and renders the feature loading component without any props
Feature-level component uses `SubPageHeaderSkeleton` with `title={t("title")}` using `useTranslations("legalRepresentatives")`
Feature-level component renders a `Typography` description text with `t("description")` matching the page's description
Feature-level component uses `CardsGridLayout` with `columns={2}` containing 2 `BoxSkeleton` elements with `width="100%"` and `height="200"` (approximating card height)
Feature-level component is a client component (`"use client"`) because it uses `useTranslations`
Does NOT import any data-fetching functions, grid components, modal components, or the FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader
